projectDescription: Bash scripts to mount and unmount CIFS/SMB network shares, with optional Cloudflare Tunnel support for secure remote access.
keyFeatures: Mount and unmount CIFS/SMB network shares with a single command
Cloudflare Tunnel integration for secure remote SMB access
Standalone tunnel management for any TCP service (databases, Redis, etc.)
Credentials file support to avoid password prompts
Environment-based configuration via .env with MOUNT_* and TUNNEL_* variables
Automatic tunnel verification before mounting tunnel-backed shares
